description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, creamy white surface, likely made of whipped cream or a similar frosting. The top is decorated with alternating fresh raspberries, blackberries, and a few blueberries, arranged in a neat circular pattern along the edge. The sides of the cake reveal a marbled, rustic texture with visible layers of cream and cake, suggesting a light, airy interior. The base appears to be a thin, dark crust, possibly made of chocolate or cookie crumbs. The cake sits on a flat, dark-colored board that serves as its display surface. There are no candles or elaborate decorations, giving it a fresh, minimalist, and inviting appearance.
description: A round, single-layer cake with a creamy white surface, topped with fresh berries and a rustic marbled side. The cake is displayed on a dark board and features a minimalist, fresh decoration style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's smooth white top with berries evenly spaced around the edge and a rustic, marbled side.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the alternating berry arrangement and the creamy, textured side with visible cake layers.
description_view_2: The cake's circular shape and even berry distribution are clear, with the marbled side and dark base visible.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the contrast between the creamy top, the berry decorations, and the rustic, layered side.
